response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff-level individual contributor with robust experience in distributed systems, microservices, and high-throughput environments. However, he completely lacks the executive leadership, organizational scaling (10 to 30+ engineers), and deep multi-agent AI architecture experience strictly required for this CTO position.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems background, including microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) developer tooling.
Experience in fintech-adjacent environments (wealth management at RIDE Capital, pricing at Tencent).
concerns: Zero executive leadership or engineering management experience; career has been exclusively in Individual Contributor (IC) roles.
Lacks the required track record of scaling engineering organizations and developing senior technical-leadership layers.
Limited production experience architecting complex, stateful multi-agent AI frameworks at an enterprise scale.
